name: Snickerdoodles- Mom Salinger
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Cream margarine and sugar. Add egg and beat well. Add flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, salt. Chill dough. Roll into walnut-sized balls and roll in sugar/cinnamon mixture. Bake 2 inches apart on an ungreased sheet for ten minutes.
